headline: Starboard Value Takes Stake in Fluor as Industrial Investment Cycles Reaccelerate
summary: Starboard Value initiated a sizable position in Fluor, an engineering and construction firm tied to large industrial and energy projects. As investment in infrastructure, manufacturing, and energy facilities drives new project pipelines, investors are watching whether Fluor can convert that activity into steadier earnings.
